arts.ttl: Man United consider exercising £15m buy-back option on Alvaro Fernandez as club struggle to agree fee with Lecce for top target Patrick Dorgu
arts.sum: Manchester United are weighing up whether to exercise their buy-back clause for Alvaro Fernandez at Benfica if they can't agree a fee for Lecce's Patrick Dorgu.

arts.ttl: Lecce drop Dorgu hint to Manchester United with bid for Hearts full-back

arts.sum: The ongoing transfer saga surrounding Davide Frattesi has taken an unexpected turn as Inter Milan prepares to start the midfielder in their upcoming match against Lecce. This development comes amidst intense speculation linking Frattesi with a move to Roma before the January transfer window closes. arts.ttl: Man United eye Álvaro Fernández as Patrick Dorgu fallback - source
arts.sum: United are keen to sign a left-back in the January window and are working on deals for both Fernandez and Dorgu. Manchester United are interested in re-signing Álvaro Fernández as an alternative to Lecce's Patrick Dorgu, a source has told ESPN,

arts.sum: As the Serie A season reaches its crucial stages, a compelling clash awaits at the Stadio Via del Mare this Sunday evening. Lecce, battling to escape the relegation zone, will host title contenders Inter Milan in a match that promises to showcase the stark contrasts between the two sides' fortunes this season. arts.ttl: Milan and Inter Surpass Juventus in Revenue, but European Elite Remains Distant
arts.sum: In a historic shift, AC Milan and Inter Milan have overtaken Juventus in revenue for the first time since the 2011-12 season. This change comes in the same year that Real Madrid became the first football club to surpass €1 billion in revenue. The post Milan and Inter Surpass Juventus in Revenue, but European Elite Remains Distant appeared first on FootItalia.com.
